app.title: BrandVoice Studio
app.tagline: Authentic prompts for your handmade textile brand

wizard.title: How do you want to use BrandVoice Studio?
wizard.managed_card_subtitle: Just create, we handle the rest

guide.toggle: Need help getting your free API key? View the step-by-step guide
guide.title: GET YOUR FREE GEMINI KEY STEP BY STEP

step1.title: Go to the platform
step1.desc: Open aistudio.google.com in your browser and sign in with your regular Gmail account.

step2.title: Open the dashboard
step2.desc: In the dark left menu, click «Dashboard». This takes you straight to the API key management section.

step3.title: Start creating
step3.desc: In the top right, find and click the highlighted button that says «Create API key».

step4.title: Configure the dialog box
step4.desc: A floating window called «Create a new key» will open:
step4.sub1_desc: Type something simple to remember (for example: «My Key»).
step4.sub2_desc: Don't worry about this! Google automatically creates a secure default project called «My First Project». It's already selected in the list. If you don't see a name, just click the dropdown and choose the option that appears.
step4.reassurance: You don't need to create anything extra! «My First Project» is already set up and pre-selected by Google. Just confirm it and continue.

step5.title: Copy and save
step5.desc: Click «Create key». A long string of letters and numbers will appear — copy it completely, come back here, and paste it in the field below. We'll store it securely in your browser!

wizard.credits_tagline: We handle the technology so you can just create.

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.description: Your data is only stored in your browser and sent directly to the chosen AI provider. We never store it on our servers.
settings.missing: Configure your AI provider to continue.
settings.format_hint_google: Must start with «AIza» followed by 35 characters.

fabricDetails.label: Fabric Details
fabricDetails.placeholder: E.g: Organic cotton muslin double layer, cream color with floral embroidery in camel tone
fabricDetails.hint: Describe textures, seams, colors and finishes (5–500 characters)

instagramVibe.label: Instagram Vibe / Occasion
instagramVibe.placeholder: E.g: Summer afternoon in the garden, intimate baby shower
instagramVibe.hint: The atmosphere or moment you want to convey (3–200 characters)

errors.api_key_missing: AI settings missing. Go to Settings.
errors.network: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.ai_service: The AI service could not generate the prompt. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.credits_exhausted: Credits exhausted. Please recharge your balance or add an API key to continue.
